case_title: PIRRI, ANGELO R et al VS DAVID FREER DBA COLLIERS WAREHOUSE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID FREER DBA COLLIERS WAREHOUSE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,220.00 FILED BY PIRRI, ANGELO R PIRRI, SUSAN R AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID FREER DBA COLLIERS WAREHOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIRRI, ANGELO R PIRRI, SUSAN R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVID FREER DBA COLLIERS WAREHOUSE $2,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00, IF DEFENDANT'S RECENT PAYMENT OF $2070.00 IS HONORED BY THE PAYING BANK, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THAT PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID FREER DBA COLLIERS WAREHOUSE
